Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-23 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
Today's momentum-ranker data shows two extraordinary performers at the top of the 700+ ticker universe. TNGX ranks #1 with a composite score of 92.3, driven by explosive 1-year returns of 976% and exceptional ratio consistency (4 of 4 ratio passes), though it posted a -1.36% 1-day decline and shows concerning negative correlations with consumer staples (XLP at -0.245). TERN follows closely with even more extreme long-term performance at 1483% annually, but displays a red flag with a negative bad_spy_score of -0.6318, suggesting it may underperform during market downturns despite crushing broad indices like SPY and QQQ by over 1400% year-to-date. Both tickers clear all SMA gates (30/50/100/200 day) and significantly outpace sector benchmarks, but their extreme gains and weak correlation to major indices indicate highly concentrated, possibly idiosyncratic momentum rather than broad-based trend strength. The data reflects a market environment rewarding highly specialized or speculative positions that diverge sharply from traditional equity factor behavior.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
